/tmp/codeql-scratch-a0efab335a3dc736/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/char.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/char_clif.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/char_cnslif.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/char_logif.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/char_mapif.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_achievement.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_auction.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_clan.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_elemental.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_guild.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_homun.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_mail.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_mercenary.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_party.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_pet.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_quest.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/int_storage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/char-server.dir/inter.cpp.o" -o /home/runner/work/moonlight/moonlight/char-server  -lm -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt /home/runner/work/moonlight/moonlight/lib/libcommonr.a -Wl,-Bdynamic -lmysqlclient /home/runner/work/moonlight/moonlight/lib/libcommon_baser.a -lm -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic -lz /home/runner/work/moonlight/moonlight/lib/libyaml-cppr.a
